svg.title: Budget Patrol Entra ID architecture showing three identity types: service principal for CI/CD, managed identity for service-to-service, and user identity for app consumers
svg.text: Budget Patrol — Entra ID & Identity Architecture
AZ-305 key insight: three identity patterns, zero stored secrets
Service principal uses workload identity federation (OIDC) — GitHub proves identity via token, no client secret.
Managed identity uses Azure-managed credentials — automatically rotated, never exposed in code.
User identity uses PKCE + refresh tokens — mobile app never sees or stores a password.
✓ Managed identity created ✓ Key Vault Secrets User assigned ◦ Service principal = next ◦ RBAC map = after
